positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration combining cosmic celestial motifs with elegant botanical elements. The main subject is a central, symmetrical arrangement of layered flora (e.g., ferns, stylized lilies, winding vines) intertwined with abstract astronomical symbols: crescent moons, geometric constellations, and nebulae dust. Use a restricted, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal gold, and matte ivory. The composition must feature clean, bold silhouettes with exceptional negative space, making it perfect for apparel printing. Style: A blend of Art Nouveau etching and modern mystical abstract art. Lighting: Dramatic, directional spotlighting that emphasizes edges and contrast. Print-ready, graphic design quality.
negative: low quality, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, artifacts, duplicate, monochrome, grayscale, childish, hyperrealistic, messy lines
